attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
BKGS.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY,
BKGS.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE,
BKGS.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE,
BKGS.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
BKGS.SALES_REP_NUMBER,
BKGS.ADJUSTMENT_CODE,
BKGS.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
SOL.BK_SO_LINE_NUMBER_INT,
SALES.BK_WEB_ORDER_ID,
BKGS.CORPORATE_BOOKINGS_FLG,
BKGS.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,
BKGS.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD,
BKGS.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT,
BKGS.DV_NET_SPREAD_FLG,
BKGS.DV_PRODUCT_KEY,
BKGS.DV_PURCHASE_ORDER_NUM,
BKGS.DV_RECURRING_OFFER_CD,
BKGS.DV_REVENUE_RECOGNITION_FLG,
BKGS.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
BKGS.DV_SOURCE_ORDER_NUM_INT,
BKGS.END_CUSTOMER_KEY,
BKGS.FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT,
BKGS.PRODUCT_KEY AS GOODS_PRODUCT_KEY,
/*CASE WHEN NP.RECURRING_OFFER_FLG = 'Y'AND NPDT.BK_PRDT_ALLCTN_CLSFCTN_CD = 'Software' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS RECURRING_SOFTWARE_FLG,*/
'Y' AS RECURRING_SOFTWARE_FLG,
CAST(BKGS.DD_COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT * CAST(NPDT.ALLOCATION_PCT AS DECIMAL (18,2)) AS DECIMAL(18,6)) AS RS_DD_COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT,
CAST(BKGS.DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT * CAST(NPDT.ALLOCATION_PCT AS DECIMAL (18,2))  AS DECIMAL(18,6)) AS RS_DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT,
CAST(COALESCE(BKGS.DD_EXTENDED_QUANTITY,0.000000) * CAST(NPDT.ALLOCATION_PCT AS DECIMAL (18,2))  AS DECIMAL(18,6)) AS RS_DD_EXTENDED_QUANTITY,
CAST(COALESCE(COALESCE(ANTY.DV_ANNUAL_NET_AMT,BKGS.DV_ANNUALIZED_US_NET_AMT),0.000000) * CAST(NPDT.ALLOCATION_PCT AS DECIMAL (18,2)) AS DECIMAL(18,6)) AS RS_DV_ANNUALIZED_US_NET_AMT,
CAST(COALESCE(COALESCE(ANTY.DV_MY_NET_PCT,BKGS.DV_MULTIYEAR_US_NET_AMT),0.000000) * CAST(NPDT.ALLOCATION_PCT AS DECIMAL (18,2)) AS DECIMAL(18,6)) AS RS_DV_MULTIYEAR_US_NET_AMT,
BKGS.RSTD_DEL_RECORD_FLG,
BKGS.SALES_ORDER_KEY,
BKGS.SERVICE_FLG,
BKGS.PRODUCT_KEY AS SERVICE_ITEM_KEY,
BKGS.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
BKGS.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT,
SALES.SK_SALES_ORDER_HEADER_ID_INT,
SOL.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT,
BKGS.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
BKGS.SK_SALES_MOTION_ATTRIB_KEY,
BKGS.SUMMARY_QUOTE_FLG,
CAST(COALESCE(BKGS.DD_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT,0.000000) * CAST(NPDT.ALLOCATION_PCT AS DECIMAL (18,2)) AS DECIMAL(18,6)) AS RS_DD_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DATETIME,
CURRENT_USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER
,BKGS.TRANSACTION_AI_FLG
,BKGS.AI_INTENT_TYPE_CD
,BKGS.TRX_AI_PRODUCT_CLASS_NAME
FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.MT_RSTD_BKGS_MEASURE BKGS

INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_RS_CTRL_MTH CTRL
ON CTRL.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT = BKGS.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT
AND CTRL.CURRENT_FISCAL_MONTH_FLAG = 'Y'
AND CTRL.PROCESS_FLAG = 'Y'

LEFT JOIN (SELECT HWSW.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY ,HWSW.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DT,HWSW.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD,HWSW.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY ,HWSW.SALES_REP_NUM,
SUM(DV_ANNUAL_NET_AMT) AS DV_ANNUAL_NET_AMT, SUM(DV_MY_NET_PCT) AS DV_MY_NET_PCT
FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.MT_PRODUCT_HWSW_ANNUITY HWSW
INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_RS_CTRL_MTH MTH
ON MTH.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT = HWSW.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT
AND MTH.CURRENT_FISCAL_MONTH_FLAG = 'Y'
AND MTH.PROCESS_FLAG = 'Y'
WHERE HWSW.BOOKING_TYPE_CD='AMY' GROUP BY 1,2,3,4,5) ANTY
ON ANTY.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY = BKGS.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY 
AND ANTY.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DT = BKGS.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE 
AND ANTY.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD = BKGS.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE
AND ANTY.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY = BKGS.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY 
AND ANTY.SALES_REP_NUM = BKGS.SALES_REP_NUMBER

INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRDT_TO_PRDT_CLSFTN_ALCTN NPDT
ON NPDT.PRODUCT_KEY = BKGS.PRODUCT_KEY
AND NPDT.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUM_INT = BKGS.FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT
AND NPDT.BK_PRDT_ALLCTN_METRIC_CD IN ('BOOKINGS', 'UNKNOWN')

INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT_TV NP
ON (CASE WHEN BKGS.PRODUCT_KEY BETWEEN -1006800 AND -1005000 THEN -998
WHEN  BKGS.PRODUCT_KEY BETWEEN -1001800 AND -1000000 THEN -999
ELSE BKGS.PRODUCT_KEY END) = NP.ITEM_KEY
AND NP.END_TV_DATE = '3500-01-01'

INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_TV  SOL
ON (CASE WHEN BKGS.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY BETWEEN -1006800 AND -1005000 THEN -8888 
WHEN BKGS.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY BETWEEN -1001800 AND -1000000   THEN -9999 
WHEN BKGS.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY BETWEEN -1011800 AND -1010000   THEN -7777 
WHEN BKGS.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY BETWEEN -1016800 AND -1015000    THEN -6666
ELSE BKGS.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY END) = SOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY

INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_TV SALES
ON SALES.SALES_ORDER_KEY = BKGS.SALES_ORDER_KEY

WHERE BKGS.SERVICE_FLG = 'N'
AND NP.RECURRING_OFFER_FLG = 'Y'
AND NPDT.BK_PRDT_ALLCTN_CLSFCTN_CD = 'Software'

SELECT
BKGS.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY,
BKGS.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE,
BKGS.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE,
BKGS.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
BKGS.SALES_REP_NUMBER,
BKGS.ADJUSTMENT_CODE,
BKGS.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
SOL.BK_SO_LINE_NUMBER_INT,
SALES.BK_WEB_ORDER_ID,
BKGS.CORPORATE_BOOKINGS_FLG,
BKGS.DV_AR_TRX_LINE_KEY,
BKGS.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD,
BKGS.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT,
BKGS.DV_NET_SPREAD_FLG,
BKGS.DV_PRODUCT_KEY,
BKGS.DV_PURCHASE_ORDER_NUM,
BKGS.DV_RECURRING_OFFER_CD,
BKGS.DV_REVENUE_RECOGNITION_FLG,
BKGS.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
BKGS.DV_SOURCE_ORDER_NUM_INT,
BKGS.END_CUSTOMER_KEY,
BKGS.FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT,
BKGS.PRODUCT_KEY AS GOODS_PRODUCT_KEY,
'N' AS RECURRING_SOFTWARE_FLG,
0 AS RS_DD_COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT,
0 AS RS_DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT,
0 AS RS_DD_EXTENDED_QUANTITY,
0 AS RS_DV_ANNUALIZED_US_NET_AMT,
0 AS RS_DV_MULTIYEAR_US_NET_AMT,
BKGS.RSTD_DEL_RECORD_FLG,
BKGS.SALES_ORDER_KEY,
BKGS.SERVICE_FLG,
BKGS.PRODUCT_KEY AS SERVICE_ITEM_KEY,
BKGS.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
BKGS.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT,
SALES.SK_SALES_ORDER_HEADER_ID_INT,
SOL.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT,
BKGS.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
BKGS.SK_SALES_MOTION_ATTRIB_KEY,
BKGS.SUMMARY_QUOTE_FLG,
0 AS RS_DD_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DATETIME,
CURRENT_USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER
,BKGS.TRANSACTION_AI_FLG
,BKGS.AI_INTENT_TYPE_CD
,BKGS.TRX_AI_PRODUCT_CLASS_NAME
FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.MT_RSTD_BKGS_MEASURE BKGS

INNER JOIN $$STGDB.WI_RS_CTRL_MTH CTRL
ON CTRL.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT = BKGS.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT
AND CTRL.CURRENT_FISCAL_MONTH_FLAG = 'Y'
AND CTRL.PROCESS_FLAG = 'Y'

INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_TV  SOL
ON (CASE WHEN BKGS.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY BETWEEN -1006800 AND -1005000 THEN -8888 
WHEN BKGS.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY BETWEEN -1001800 AND -1000000   THEN -9999 
WHEN BKGS.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY BETWEEN -1011800 AND -1010000   THEN -7777 
WHEN BKGS.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY BETWEEN -1016800 AND -1015000    THEN -6666
ELSE BKGS.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY END) = SOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY

INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_TV SALES
ON SALES.SALES_ORDER_KEY = BKGS.SALES_ORDER_KEY

WHERE BKGS.SERVICE_FLG = 'N'
AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.WI_RS_GOODS_INCR GOODS
WHERE GOODS.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY = BKGS.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY
AND GOODS.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE = BKGS.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE
AND GOODS.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE = BKGS.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE
AND GOODS.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY = BKGS.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY
AND GOODS.SALES_REP_NUMBER = BKGS.SALES_REP_NUMBER
AND GOODS.GOODS_PRODUCT_KEY = BKGS.PRODUCT_KEY)
